steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the word “thus,” which signals a conclusion based on the preceding evidence.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The conclusion must link the Scottish ancestry of Upland South colonists to the shared “r” emphasis. A directly connects Scotland’s influence to the Upland South’s dialect.

B and C reverse or misframe the historical influence, while D contradicts the passage’s claim that “r” is strongly emphasized in both dialects.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
